heading: 1 Biomass_yieldTables
text: documentation work progress. Potential discrepancies omissions may exist time . find , please contact us .

heading: 1.1 Overview
text: objective module produce yield curves user-specified study area LandR simulations. , module initialize landscape keeping species composition, setting biomass 1 ages 0. module Biomass_core run internally without dispersal disturbances simulate vegetation dynamics year 0 species dies (.e., maximum longevity among species). module records ground biomass species, pixel, time step build yield tables take account species traits competition.

heading: 1.2 Inputs
text: module inputs Biomass_core. now, defaults inputs, user either need provide inputs needed use module modules prepare inputs (e.g., Biomass_borealDataPrep).Name | Class | Description | Source |

heading: 1.4.1 Events
text: Everything module init event:module initializes landscape keeping species present pixel, setting species ages 0 biomass 1.New pixel groups created pixels shares species composition ecoregion, pixel groups becomre yieldTableIndex.Vegetation dynamics simulated running Biomass_core internally. object cohortData saved year.cohortData files saved step 2 loaded combined create yield tables.module plots resulting yieldTables.

heading: 1.4.2 Plotting
text: default, module plots yield table 40 set growth curves (set growth curve growth species coexisting given pixel, named yieldTableIndex). number set growth curves can changed parameter numPlots.module also plots maps yieldTableIndex. forested pixel yieldTableIndex referencing set growth curve pixel.

heading: 1.4.4 Links to other modules
text: Since default inputs Biomass_yieldTables, likely always run Biomass_borealDataPrep another module prepares data run Biomass_core. Using Biomass_yieldTables Biomass_borealDataPrep generate yield tables using default LandR species traits, often underestimate species coexistence. Using module Biomass_speciesParameters Biomass_speciesFactorial calibrate species traits permanent sample plots help generate capture realistically competition.yield tables created module inputs module need growth curves. example, can use yield tables simulate cohort growth like spadesCBM.

heading: 1.4.5 Usage
text: example workflow build yield tables RIA study area (Northeast British-Columbia) can found script global_LandRyieldTables.R repository LandRCBM.

heading: 2.1 Overview
text: objective module make data coming LandR ecosystem compatible spadesCBM. module provides yearly increments three ground biomass pools: merchantable, foliage, . yield tables useful spinup event spadesCBM, yearly cohort data used annual event spadesCBM. module can also translate disturbances provided disturbance modules format expected spadesCBM.

heading: 2.2 Inputs
text: inputs LandRCBM_split3pools combination expected outputs LandR, data convert total ground biomass merchantable, foliage biomass, data expected input spadesCBM.default inputs RIA study area. inputs expected provided modules (CBMdefault, Biomass_core, Biomass_yieldTables, Biomass_borealDataPrep, etc.).Name | Class | Description | Source |

heading: 2.4.1 Events
text: 7 events:init: Splits total ground biomass yield tables biomass three ground carbon pools.plotYC: Plots yield tables split ground carbon pools resulting increments.annualIncrements: time step, compares cohortData previous year, calculates difference biomass cohort, convert difference increments three ground carbon pools.annualDisturbances: specified, translates yearly disturbances simulated modules data.table can digested CBM_core.summarizeAGBPools: time step, summarizes ground biomass ground carbon pools species across landscape.plotMaps: regular interval, maps ground biomass increments carbon pools.plotSummaries: end simulation, plots evolution ground biomass pools species entire landscape.

heading: 2.4.2 Plotting
text: 3 types plots created.First, modules plots figures related yield tables. module returns figure yield curves total ground biomass number (controlled parameter numPixGroupPlots) yield table ids. yield table ids, module also plots yield tables divided ground carbon pools resulting increments.Second, regular interval, controlled parameter .plotInterval, modules returns maps biomass increments merchantable, foliage, carbon pools.Third, end simulation, modules returns figures evolution ground biomass divided pools across landscape species.

heading: 2.4.4 Links to other modules
text: module can used standalone, likely used modules. module Biomass_* family can provide inputs needed LandRCBM_split3pools simulate vegetation dynamics. Disturbance modules like fireSense can used simulate disturbances. Finally, CBM_core can used simulate carbon dynamics different carbon pools.
